---
name: Script request / idea
about: Suggest a new script, or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What task would this help with?**
<!-- The real-world sysadmin job you're trying to make easier. -->

**What should it do?**
<!-- Inputs, outputs, and the safe default behavior. If it changes anything, it should support -WhatIf. -->

**Have you got a rough version already?**
<!-- If so, consider opening a pull request instead — see CONTRIBUTING.md. Happy to help shape it here first. -->
